free_cv.hero_subtitle1: Tech giants use robots (ATS) to filter you in 3 seconds. Drag your PDF to discover your score and the
free_cv.flaws_found: AI found {count} critical flaws blocking your interviews:
free_cv.locked_subtitle: Unlock full audit to see details.
free_cv.cta_unlock_subtitle: Let our AI Mentor fix these {count} flaws and generate a high-level CV.
free_cv.bento_feature1_desc: HR no longer reads CVs. Algorithms scan your PDF to extract text. If your layout blocks the AI (complex columns, level bars) or exact keywords are missing, your score falls to zero.
free_cv.bento_feature2_desc: Our LLM model is trained on 10,000+ real rejections. The free audit bluntly extracts the flaw that instantly makes a Lead Tech cringe.
free_cv.bento_feature3_desc: In the Premium Space, let the AI rewrite your experiences bullet point by bullet point with impact-oriented metrics.
free_cv.seo_article_title: How AI Deciphers Your ATS-Formatted CV?
free_cv.seo_article_p1: In today's Tech and Finance market, nearly 90% of large companies filter applications via Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). This software automatically scans and sorts the thousands of PDFs received without any initial human intervention.
free_cv.seo_article_p2: The AI CV Audit rigorously reproduces the judgment of the machine and a hyper-selective recruiter. Artificial intelligence scrutinizes the semantic aspect of the text, detects the density of technical keywords, and looks for quantified evidence of business impact.
free_cv.seo_article_h3: Why 90% of applications end up ignored?
free_cv.seo_article_li1: Semantic Paralysis: Graphically over-engineered CVs (massive two-columns, SVG skill gauges, non-standard fonts) shatter the machine's text extraction.
free_cv.seo_article_li2: Lack of output metrics: The number one error identified by leads. Saying "Team Lead" is worthless compared to "Managed a squad of 7 devs, increased velocity by 24% over 2 sprints". AI will immediately penalize this lack.
free_cv.seo_article_li3: Inconsistent action verbs: Using passive or vague terms instead of impact words like Orchestrated, Maximized, Implemented.
free_cv.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) on CV Diagnosis
free_cv.faq_a1: Absolutely. Without creating an account, drag your PDF into the AI scanner. You will instantly get your "ATS Survival Score" out of 100 as well as the fundamental error that is probably costing you interviews. It's the equivalent of a first filter by a selective recruitment firm.
free_cv.faq_q2: Do you keep my Word or PDF document on your servers?
free_cv.faq_a2: Under no circumstances. Algorithmic analysis is ephemeral and confidential. The text extraction is discarded instantly after LLM inference. Furthermore, only the .pdf (protected) format is supported to guarantee a 1-to-1 simulation of submission conditions.
free_cv.faq_q3: What happens if my score is below average?
free_cv.faq_a3: A red score (generally sub-70) indicates that sorting robots are likely not to even forward it to HR. If so, you can open a free GoldArmy space to let artificial intelligence rebuild your work experiences with a bulletproof "Harvard Template".
free_cv.final_cta_desc: Don't let other less competent candidates take your place because of a bad PDF.

free_interview.hero_subtitle: Take an ultra-realistic Video Interview simulation. Our AI takes the role of a ruthless Lead Tech and analyzes your voice, your silences and your arguments in real time.
free_interview.activate_mic: Activate the mic at the bottom to reply.
free_interview.end_simulation_desc: That was brutal, right? GoldArmy lets you repeat this ordeal until you become completely stress-proof.
free_interview.bento_feature1_desc: The simulator listens to you in real time with the Web Speech API. AI analyzes your speech rate, your confidence and sanctions the slightest stutter.
free_interview.bento_feature2_desc: AI generates ultra-specific technical questions for your position, drawn from Google and Meta interview databases.
free_interview.bento_feature3_desc: Receive direct criticism. You won't know your answer "lacks metrics" if no one dares to tell you to your face. AI dares.
free_interview.seo_article_h2: How does our AI Interview Simulator work?
free_interview.seo_article_p1: Preparing for a job interview in front of a mirror is no longer enough. Our AI Interview Simulator uses Web Speech API technology coupled with a Large Language Model (LLM) to create a realistic stress environment. The AI listens to your responses in real time, analyzes the semantics of your speech, the richness of your technical vocabulary, and the absence of hesitations.
free_interview.seo_article_li1: Extreme Scraping: The algorithm is based on thousands of trick questions leaked from interviews at Google, Meta, and Stripe to forge its character as a ruthless evaluator.
free_interview.seo_article_li2: Deep Semantic Analysis: The model penalizes the use of weak words ("I think", "maybe") and rewards action verbs ("I architected", "I maximized").
free_interview.seo_article_li3: Real-Time Feedback: AI instantly identifies if you haven't answered the core question or if you skipped a technical point.
free_interview.faq_q1: Do I need to turn on my camera for the free trial?
free_interview.faq_a1: No. For this free public trial, only your web browser's voice recognition is solicited. Your audio data only temporarily leaves your device as text for algorithmic analysis.
free_interview.faq_q2: Does the simulator take my exact job into account?
free_interview.faq_a2: Yes. Before starting the call, you type your target job title (e.g., "Senior Backend Developer Python"). The AI Recruiter will then adjust its lexicon and generate adapted software architecture or management technical questions.
free_interview.faq_q3: Why does the AI voice sound so cold?
free_interview.faq_a3: It's a design choice. The idea is to place you in the temporal "Panic Zone". By being cold and direct, the simulator forces you to control your own breathing and structure your thinking without the natural empathy of a human to reassure you.
free_interview.final_cta_desc: Unlock the simulator without time limit. Take back-to-back 45-minute mock interviews and learn to dominate the discussion.
